programs.name: Murph 備戰計劃
programs.subtitle: 6-Week Murph Prep
programs.description: 六週計劃，逐步建立 1-mile run、100 pull-ups、200 push-ups、300 air squats 的體能基礎。第六週減量，第七週挑戰 Murph。

movements: Min.2 | 2 wall walks + 5 box jumps (20/24 in)
* Use two dumbbells for front squats and one for snatches
* Use a pull-up bar at least 6 inches above your reach
* Run 400 meters at the start of each 3-minute interval
Even minute | Max dumbbell devils presses (20/35 lb)
1:00 shuttle runs (25 ft out and back)
* Every minute on the minute starting at :00, perform 20 double-unders
– 1 shuttle run = 25 feet out and 25 feet back
50 alternating dumbbell clean and jerks (35/50 lb)

programs.name: 四週嚴格引體向上計劃
programs.subtitle: 4-Week Strict Pull-up Program
programs.description: 12天系統訓練，從基礎懸吊與划船動作出發，逐步建立完成嚴格引體向上的力量。

movements: 1) 3×10 ring rows – Feet under the rings
2) 30s×3 active hang from the pull-up bar
3) 100 banded pull a parts – Use a thin band
1) 3×10 ring rows – Feet under the rings
2) 2×20 dumbbell bent over rows – use weight you can do 10+ reps unbroken
3) 100 banded face pulls – Use a thin band
1) 3×10 ring rows – Feet 1 step forward of the rings
2) 30s×3 active hang from the pull-up bar
2) 5×3 negative chin-over-bar pull-ups – Start with chin over bar, lower on a 2-count
3) 100 banded pull a-parts – Use a thin band
1) 5×5 banded pull-ups – Use a band that allows 5 unbroken controlled reps
3) 100 banded face pulls – Use a thin band
1) 4×8 archer rows – Pull deeper on the bar vs Day 4
2) 6×3 negative chin-over-bar pull-ups – lower on a 2-count
1) 3×5 jumping chin-over-bar pull-ups – Jump only as much as needed, do not hold the negative
2) 5×3 negative chin-over-bar pull-ups – lower on a 3-count
3) 5×1 supinated strict pull-up attempts – pull as close to bar as possible
4) 100 banded pull a parts – Use a thin band
1) 6×5 banded pull-ups – Use a band that allows 5 unbroken controlled reps
2) 4×6 archer rows – Pull deeper on the bar vs Day 6
3) 100 banded face pulls – Use a thin band
1) 10×2 banded pull-ups – Use a band that allows 2 controlled reps
2) 5×2 negative chin-over-bar pull-ups – lower on a 3-count
3) 5×1 pronated strict pull-up attempts – pull as close to bar as possible
1) 10×2 negative chin-over-bar pull-ups – lower on a 3-count
2) 5×1 supinated strict pull-up attempts – pull as close to bar as possible
3) 100 banded pull a parts – Use a thin band
1) 3×5 jumping chin-over-bar pull-ups – Jump only as much as needed, do not hold the negative
2) 10×1 banded pull-up – Use a band that allows 1 controlled rep
3) 5×1 pronated strict pull-up attempts – pull as close to bar as possible
4) 100 banded face pulls – Use a thin band
– Pull fast! Strict doesn't mean slow.
– Drive elbows down toward the ground
– Keep pulling, keep your body rigid

programs.name: 首次 Bar Muscle-Up 計劃
programs.subtitle: Get Your First Bar Muscle-Up
programs.description: 前置條件：3-5 下嚴格 chest-to-bar 引體向上、嚴格單槓撐體；靜態撐體上下各 10 秒以上。

movements: 3) 100 banded pull a parts – Use a thin band
2) 4×6 paused dumbbell bench press – Pause on chest for 1 second each rep
3) 100 banded face pulls – Use a thin band
3) 100 banded pull a parts – Use a thin band
1) 5×3 jumping bar muscle-up – Jump only enough to get your body over the bar
3) 5×3 weighted chin-over-bar pull-ups – use weight that allows 3 reps unbroken
4) 100 banded face pulls – Use a thin band
1) 5×3 banded bar muscle-ups – Use a band that allows 3 unbroken controlled reps
1) 5×1 bar muscle-up attempts – best effort under own power
2) 5×3 jumping bar muscle-up – Jump only enough to get body over bar
3) 4×6 paused dumbbell bench press – 1-sec pause, increase loading vs Week 1
4) 5×3 weighted chest-to-bar pull-ups – weight for 3 unbroken
5) 100 banded pull a parts – Use a thin band
1) 5×2 banded bar muscle-ups – Use a band that allows 2 unbroken controlled reps
4) 100 banded face pulls – Use a thin band
1) 5×1 bar muscle-up attempts – best effort under own power
1) 5×1 bar muscle-up attempts – best effort under own power
2) 5×2 banded bar muscle-ups – band for 2 unbroken controlled
4) 10×2 weighted chest-to-bar pull-ups – weight for 3 unbroken
5) 100 banded pull a parts – Use a thin band
1) 5×1 bar muscle-up attempts – best effort under own power
5) 100 banded face pulls – Use a thin band
– Big kip swing, let yourself get as far behind the bar as possible
– Pull the bar into the hips, sit up fast
– Keep the bar tight to your body, look for your toes, press out

programs.name: 首次倒立伏地挺身計劃
programs.subtitle: Get Your First Handstand Push-Up
programs.description: 前置條件：腳尖 10 下以上伏地挺身、能夠靠牆倒立、靜態倒立 20 秒以上。

movements: 2) 5×3 partial wall-walk + :03 hold – Take 2-4 steps toward the wall then hold
3) 100 banded pull a parts – Use a thin band
1) 3×10 seated dumbbell shoulder presses – Increase loading but maintain unbroken reps
2) 10×50-ft single-arm overhead kettlebell carry – 5 sets right arm, 5 left; increase loading
4) 100 banded tricep pull-downs – Use a thin band
1) 3×10 piked push-ups – Hips up, feet close to hands, AbMat target for head, start and finish in downward dog
2) 5×3 full wall-walk + :03 hold – Walk until chest hits wall; do not over-extend body toward wall
3) 100 banded pull a parts – Use a thin band
1) 4×10 dumbbell push presses – Increase loading but maintain unbroken reps
2) 8×100-ft single-arm overhead kettlebell carry – 4 sets right arm, 4 left; increase loading
4) 100 banded tricep pull-downs – Use a thin band
1) 4×8 piked push-ups – Increase difficulty vs Day 4: walk feet closer or elevate on box
1) 6×5 piked push-ups – Increase difficulty vs Week 2: feet closer to hands or elevated on box
3) 3×3 handstand push-up negatives – lower head to floor on 2-count; add 1-2 mats if needed
4) 100 banded pull a parts – Use a thin band
1) 5×6 seated dumbbell shoulder presses – Increase loading vs Week 1
2) 8×100-ft single-arm overhead kettlebell carry – 4 right, 4 left; increase loading
4) 100 banded tricep pull-downs – Use a thin band
1) 5×3 handstand push-up negatives – lower on 2-count; add mats if needed
2) 3×20 alternating shoulder taps – feet on box, pike position
1) 7×3 handstand push-up negatives – lower on 2-count; add 1-2 mats if needed
2) 5×12 alternating shoulder taps – stomach against wall after wall walk
3) 100 banded pull a parts – Use a thin band
1) 5×6 dumbbell push presses – Increase loading vs Week 2
2) 10×100-ft single-arm overhead kettlebell carry – 5 right, 5 left; increase loading
3) 8 sets × 20 seconds hollow body rocks + 10 seconds rest
4) 100 banded tricep pull-downs – Use a thin band
– Keep your body rigid as you lower
– As your head touches the ground, drive away fast
– Keep core tight and push your head through your arms

blocks.name: Strength I
blocks.notes: Strength I 循環第三週，繼續用第一週選定的動作。以最近 1RM 計算重量，組間充分休息。

blocks.name: Strength II
blocks.notes: Strength II 循環第三週，目標是找到今日最重的單下前蹲舉。逐組加重，每 3 分鐘做一組。

blocks.name: Strength III
movements: 沙袋熊抱走 100 公尺（32/45 kg）
過頭持槓片走 100 公尺（16/20 kg）
向後拉雪橇 100 公尺（20/40 kg）
blocks.notes: 選擇能不間斷完成的重量，維持穩定節奏。動作之間可充分休息。熊抱走保持挺胸；過頭走肋骨收緊、手肘鎖定。

blocks.name: Skill I
blocks.notes: 組間休息 2:00–3:00。不熟悉 skin-the-cat 可先看示範影片。引體向上可減量、用彈力帶輔助或改做 ring row。

blocks.name: Stamina I
movements: 划船機 / 腳踏車 / 滑雪機，計總距離
每分鐘整點衝刺 :15 秒
blocks.notes: 從慢速開始，衝刺時盡量提速。衝刺後充分降速確保能反覆重複。計分為 15 分鐘總距離。

blocks.name: Strength I
blocks.notes: Strength I 循環第四週，繼續用第一週選定的動作。八週循環結束後可更換動作。

blocks.name: Strength II
blocks.notes: Strength II 循環第四週（減量週）。每組維持紮實技術、重量變動幅度小。每 3 分鐘做一組。

blocks.name: Strength III
movements: 向後拉雪橇 400 公尺（11/20 kg）
blocks.notes: 計畫約 20 分鐘完成。拉雪橇時面向雪橇、抓繩後退走；重量應能維持穩定節奏走完全程。

blocks.name: Skill I
movements: 奇數分鐘：嚴格 Muscle-up 1–3 下（吊環）
blocks.notes: 無法做 muscle-up 可改做 low-ring 轉換練習，調整難度。把這堂課當作技術練習機會，不要求力竭。

blocks.name: Stamina I
movements: 輕鬆步行 100 公尺（恢復）
blocks.notes: 維持可持續的配速，不要全力衝刺。步行 100 公尺是你的休息時間，不計時。跑步替代：400 公尺划船（節奏配速）。

blocks.name: Strength I
blocks.notes: Strength I 循環第五週，繼續用第一週選定的動作。以最近 1RM 計算重量，Jerk 請從架子上取槓，組間充分休息。

blocks.name: Strength II
blocks.notes: 新循環第一週，從前蹲舉切換到臥推。第 4、5 組使用相同重量，最後一組在技術穩定的前提下多做幾下（不到力竭）。組間充分休息。

blocks.name: Strength III
movements: 向後拉雪橇 800 公尺（20/32 kg）
blocks.notes: 接繩子或帶子到雪橇，面向雪橇、直臂後退走。大腿前側會有明顯感受。維持持續移動，必要時可減輕重量。

blocks.name: Skill I
blocks.notes: 這是技術練習課，不是體能訓練。無法做 muscle-up 可改做跳躍式 muscle-up、low-ring 轉換練習或吊環 false pull-up。

blocks.name: Stamina I
movements: 慢跑 200 公尺（恢復配速）
慢跑 100 公尺（恢復配速）
blocks.notes: 跑步段全力投入，避免保留體力。200 公尺慢跑就是你的休息，組間無額外休息。建議在跑道上進行，總時間約 25 分鐘以內。

blocks.name: Strength I
blocks.notes: Strength I 循環第六週，繼續用第一週選定的動作。以最近 1RM 計算重量，Jerk 請從架子上取槓，組間充分休息。

blocks.name: Strength II
blocks.notes: Strength II 循環第二週，繼續臥推。找今日 3 下的最大重量。第 4、5 組使用相同重量，最後一組可超過 3 下但不到力竭。有同伴請準備保護。

blocks.name: Strength III
movements: 沙袋熊抱走 200 公尺（32/45 kg）
單臂啞鈴過頭走 100 公尺（左）（16/22.5 kg）
單臂啞鈴過頭走 100 公尺（右）
blocks.notes: 動作間充分休息。沙袋走分 2-3 組；過頭走 1-2 組。選擇能輕鬆走但後段有挑戰感的重量。過頭走推到失敗為止，不要在 20 呎前停下。

blocks.name: Skill I
blocks.notes: 組間休息 2:00。設置 30 公尺路線，走越遠越好不落地。棒式可用手掌或前臂。無法倒立走可改 50 下交替肩觸（腳架高於肩）。

blocks.name: Strength I
blocks.notes: Strength I 循環第二週，繼續 Wave Loading 模板。第五週減量，第六週測 1RM 抓舉。百分比以近期最大重量或重組單次計算。多於 1 下的組數請以觸地不停（touch-and-go）完成。組間、波次間充分休息。

blocks.name: Strength II
blocks.notes: Strength II 循環第二週，持續深蹲力量累積。第 4、5 組使用相同重量，最後一組可超過 4 下但不至力竭。組間充分休息。

blocks.name: Strength III
movements: 啞鈴農夫走（Dumbbell Farmers Carry）50 公尺
blocks.notes: 組間充分休息。雙槓撐體逐漸增重，目標建立 10 下最重組。農夫走選擇可全程不落地的重量。

blocks.name: Skill I
movements: 嚴格吊環肌肉上（Strict Ring Muscle-Ups）× 1–3
blocks.notes: 全程優先動作品質。坐姿抬腿目標兩腳跟離地至少 7–8 公分；困難時可稍微後仰。肌肉上選擇 1 分鐘內可完成的下數；無法完成可練低環轉換。牆上走下降要控制，避免衝撞地板；無法胸貼牆者盡量靠近。

blocks.name: Stamina I
movements: C2 腳踏車 500/600 公尺（女/男）
blocks.notes: 每組維持在 1:30 以內。前幾組保守配速，之後逐漸加快。目標每組誤差不超過 5 秒。替代：Assault Bike 700/1,000 公尺、Echo Bike 700/1,000 公尺、划船 250/300 公尺、雪橇機 250/300 公尺。
